title: Valcon
description: An addon and core mod for the Starfell modpacks. Let the stars guide you!
body:
Valcon is an addon mod for Starfell: Rise of The Valcon Knight for Neoforge 1.21.1. This mod is not gaurenteed to work with any other pack, suggestions are welcome though!

Feature List:
- Lembas bread, the new best food made out of honeycomb, flowers, and dough.
- Soul forge, a new station capable of reforging your equipment to be unbreakable at the cost of soul steel.
- Five new shard items. Sorrow, Soul, Winter, Wrather, and Umbral
- Bast statue, a block that provides resistance to nearby players, acting as a mini beacon.
- Star Taker Disc, made by SociopathicFungusGirl.
- Devil Trigger disc by Casey Edwards, instrumental.
- A new weapon, the Soulborn Blade.
- A few crafting materials, such as souls and enchanting guides, made to slow down progression dealing with enchantments.
- Removed sleeping functionality.

This mod is still a work in progress!
Enchanting guide and lembas textures by Noelledotjpg.
